title: Dri Aire 3 * 500G Refill Bag Compatible With Premium Moisture Absorber M Size Helps Prevent Damp Mould And Condensation Absorbs Moisture Quickly And Easily
features: Powerful Moisture Absorption: The Dri Aire 3*500G Refill Bag absorbs excess moisture from the air quickly and effectively, helping to maintain a dry and comfortable environment in kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, or other damp areas.

Prevents Damp And Mould: Designed to reduce damp, mould, and condensation, the Dri Aire Refill Bag protects walls, furniture, and belongings from moisture damage, keeping your home fresh and safe with ease.

Easy And Convenient To Use: Simply insert each bag into your Premium Moisture Absorber M Size unit. No complicated installation or setup is required, making moisture control effortless and stress-free.

Long-Lasting Protection: Each 500g bag absorbs up to 1 litre of water. With three refill bags included, you get extended protection against moisture, ensuring your living spaces remain dry for longer periods.
Compact And Discreet Design: The Dri Aire 3*500G Refill Bags are space-saving and lightweight, allowing easy placement in smaller or hard-to-reach areas without affecting the aesthetics of your home.
description: Keep your home dry and comfortable with the Dri Aire 3*500G Refill Bag. Compatible with the Premium Moisture Absorber M Size, each bag absorbs up to 1 litre of moisture, helping prevent damp, mould, and condensation. Easy to use, long-lasting, and effective, it’s the ideal solution for any room.
